problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bioelectrochemical. Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
